prompt.content:
Make the following updates to assess S&P Mobility’s value in the model using a peer based approach

1.	Update the subscription revenue YoY growth rate to 9% in 2026, keep fixed until 2028, then reduce by 1 percentage point in 2029 and 2030

2.	Update the Non-subscription / transaction revenue YoY growth rate to 5% in 2026, keep fixed until 2028 and decline by 0.5 percentage points in 2029 and 2030

3.	Update the Operating-related expenses  % revenue assumption to 30% in 2026, and decline by 0.5 percentage points every year following

4.	Update the selling and general expenses % revenue assumption to 26% in 2026, then keep fixed every year following

5. Update Risk-free rate to 5 year US treasury rate as of Jan 02, 2025

6.	Find the enterprise value and TTM EBITDA of the following peer companies. 

a.	Vontier Corporation (VNT) as of September 26, 2025 

b.	Li Auto Inc (LI) as of September 30, 2025 

7.	Calculate the average of the EV/TTM EBITDA of the peer companies above (to 2 decimal places) and use it to calculate the present value of the terminal value of S&P mobility (in $ million to the nearest million)

8.	Calculate the following; 
a.	Enterprise value (in $ million to the nearest million)
b.	Implied EV/ 2025 EBITDA (to 2 decimal places)
